image_005f3ac5cc2ec5.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"y=2\\cos(\\frac{\\pi}{3}-x)-2\\cos x+1=2(\\cos\\frac{\\pi}{3}\\cos x+\\sin\\frac{\\pi}{3}\\sin x)-2\\cos x+1","note":"三角函數展開公式"}

image_03b6684f7ca09a.png.latex: \tan x+\frac{1}{\tan x}=\frac{\sin x}{\cos x}+\frac{\cos x}{\sin x}=\frac{1}{\sin x\cos x}=\frac{2}{\sin 2x}=1
image_03b6684f7ca09a.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\tan x+\\frac{1}{\\tan x}=\\frac{\\sin x}{\\cos x}+\\frac{\\cos x}{\\sin x}=\\frac{1}{\\sin x\\cos x}=\\frac{2}{\\sin 2x}=1","note":"三角函數等式"}

image_3e021bd54b7987.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"=\\sqrt{3}\\sin x-\\cos x+1=2(\\sin x\\cos\\frac{\\pi}{6}-\\cos x\\sin\\frac{\\pi}{6})+1=2\\sin(x-\\frac{\\pi}{6})+1","note":"三角函數化簡公式"}

image_45b4088242f020.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\sin x-\\cos x=\\sqrt{2}\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2}}\\sin x-\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2}}\\cos x\\right)","note":"三角函數式變形"}

image_46c3fc894119f0.png.note: 三角函數和角公式表達式
image_46c3fc894119f0.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"=2\\sqrt{3}(\\cos\\frac{\\pi}{6}\\sin x+\\sin\\frac{\\pi}{6}\\cos x)","note":"三角函數和角公式表達式"}

image_5876819f74f7f7.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\sin x\\cos x=\\frac{1}{2}\\sin 2x","note":"三角函數倍角公式"}

image_5caadf403d6053.png.note: 三角函數化成振幅形式的中間步驟
image_5caadf403d6053.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"y=2\\sin 2x-3\\cos 2x+5=\\sqrt{13}\\left(\\frac{2}{\\sqrt{13}}\\sin 2x-\\frac{3}{\\sqrt{13}}\\cos 2x\\right)+5","note":"三角函數化成振幅形式的中間步驟"}

image_83441b0918f84f.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"f(x)=3\\sin x+4\\cos x=5\\left(\\frac{3}{5}\\sin x+\\frac{4}{5}\\cos x\\right)","note":"三角函數線性組合化簡"}

image_843860128d74ce.png.note: 三角函數和差化簡公式
image_843860128d74ce.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\overline{AD}=\\overline{BE}+\\overline{CE}=a\\sin x+b\\cos x=\\sqrt{a^2+b^2}\\sin(x+\\theta)","note":"三角函數和差化簡公式"}

image_aa74474e98ff40.png.note: 三角函數和角公式展開
image_aa74474e98ff40.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"y=\\sqrt{3}\\sin(x+\\frac{\\pi}{6})-2\\sin x=\\sqrt{3}(\\sin x\\cos\\frac{\\pi}{6}+\\cos x\\sin\\frac{\\pi}{6})-2\\sin x","note":"三角函數和角公式展開"}

image_ad7e033897ae27.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"y=\\sin x+\\sqrt{3}\\cos x=2\\sin\\left(x+\\frac{\\pi}{3}\\right)\\Rightarrow -2\\le y\\le 2","note":"三角函數合成與值域"}

image_b2a74271cc45ea.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"y=3\\cos^2 x+2\\sin x\\cos x+\\sin^2 x=3\\times\\frac{1+\\cos 2x}{2}+\\sin 2x+\\frac{1-\\cos 2x}{2}","note":"三角函數化簡公式"}

image_b3f639d4573437.png.note: 三角式恆等變形與下界

image_b4b7aafe425a61.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"=4\\sin x+\\sqrt{3}\\cos x-\\sin x=3\\sin x+\\sqrt{3}\\cos x","note":"三角函數式化簡"}
